title: tecoma stans var. stans
intro: Tecoma stans var. stans, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant species belonging to the trumpet vine family. It is native to the southern United States, Mexico, and Central America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Tecoma stans var. stans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
